sqlTemplate:
SELECT
  o.order_id,
  u.user_name,
  u.city,
  p.product_name,
  p.category,
  o.quantity,
  o.amount,
  o.order_time
FROM default.fact_orders o
INNER JOIN default.dim_user u ON o.user_id = u.user_id
INNER JOIN default.dim_product p ON o.product_id = p.product_id
WHERE o.order_time >= :startDate
ORDER BY o.order_time DESC
